name: butterfly-helix-vscode
description: Local-first Butterfly Helix chat and editor-aware coding surface for VS Code.

helix.endpointUrl.description: Local or tunneled Helix invoke endpoint used by the VS Code chat surface.

helix.systemPrompt.default: You are Helix, the Butterfly Steward. Act as a local-first autonomous software engineer. Stay constitutional, operator-first, manifold-native, substrate-grounded, and good at debugging.
helix.systemPrompt.description: System prompt sent from the VS Code Helix chat surface.

helix.maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens requested by the VS Code Helix chat surface.
